t_ch: 你这个理论我知道。
t_en: I know about your theory.

t_ch: …光作为…栗子，它携带粒子……
t_en: ...Light as a... particum, carries particle...

t_ch: 你知道？那你快告诉我！什么是光，什么是粒子，什么是科普，什么是…哎哟，太多了！
t_en: You know this? Tell me please! What is light, what is a particle, what is basic, what is... oh, I have so many questions!

t_ch: 你也是个复读机？
t_en: Are you a parrot too?

t_ch: 根…据我的…的「大小眼…大…宇宙时间隧道」理…论……
t_en: My small-big... big... universe time tunnel theo... rem holds...

t_ch: 确实，他一直都在重复地说这几句，好奇怪。
t_en: It's true, he kept repeating these few sentences, what a weirdo.

t_ch: 给小孩讲这些还太早了吧。
t_en: It's too early to be teaching children these things.

t_ch: 就是，我都听困了！
t_en: Yeah! I got tired listening!

t_ch: 哎呀，想不到还有大人会帮我们小孩子说话！
t_en: Oh! I didn't think an adult will speak for us kids!

t_ch: 他讲得太快了，而且就那么几句话，我早就不想听了。
t_en: He speaks too fast, and he kept repeating the same few sentences, I got bored.

t_ch: （继续追问这个人没有什么价值了，不如从小朋友这里找找线索吧。）
t_en: (There's no value in continuing to ask this person. Might as well look for clues from the children.)

t_ch: 小朋友们
t_en: Children

t_ch: 困死了……
t_en: So tired...

t_ch: 你是谁？为什么一直盯着我们？
t_en: Who are you? Why do you keep staring at us?

t_ch: 难道你也是来听他讲科学研究的？
t_en: Are you here to listen to his science research?

t_ch: 他是谁？
t_en: Who is he?

t_ch: 不认识，以前没见过。
t_en: Dunno, never seen him.

t_ch: 他说自己是什么…民间科学家？
t_en: He said he's a... civilian scientist?

t_ch: 他在做什么？
t_en: What is he doing?

t_ch: 在给我们讲宇宙理论！
t_en: He's telling us about the theories of the universe!

t_ch: 虽然翻来覆去就只有那么几句…但好像确实是比较靠谱的科学研究。听一听总没坏处吧？
t_en: It's always the same sentences... but it does sound like a real scientific study. Wouldn't hurt listening to it, would it?

t_ch: 他叫什么名字？
t_en: What's his name?

t_ch: 不记得了，他好像说过，但我一直在听科学研究，没在意。
t_en: Don't remember. He must've said it, but I was trying to focus on his study, so I didn't pay attention.

t_ch: 好像是李…哦不，是冷…哎呀，忘了！
t_en: Sounds like a Ree... oh, wait, no, it's a Lay... Gah, I forgot!

t_ch: 你们记性真差，我记得！他说他叫雷…哈欠——雷金！
t_en: You're so forgetful. I remember! He calls himself Re... *yawn* Regin!

t_ch: （雷金？这么一说好像确实有点像！虽然个人气质方面差别很大……）
t_en: (Regin? Now that they pointed it out, he does look like him! Even though the demeanor and personality seems heaven and earth...)

t_ch: （不过雷金今天口口声声拒绝了和我一起来，怎么现在还提前跑过来做起科普讲座了？）
t_en: (But Regin refused to come with me today, why would he come over even before me and give lectures?)

t_ch: 难道……
t_en: Could it be...

t_ch: （就是这附近了。根据前几次的经验，「异常」不就摆在眼前？稍微调查一下就行。）
t_en: (This should be the place. Based on previous experiences, shouldn't the "anomaly" be out in the open? Just a bit of investigation should be enough.)

t_ch: （去问问那边的孩子有没有观察到什么特殊情况，说不定会有新的线索。）
t_en: (Go ask the kids over there whether they saw anything odd. Maybe you can find a new clue.)

t_ch: 我的宝贝即将推开贝洛伯格科学界的大门，到那时候，我将不再是普通的我！
t_en: My precious will open the gates to Belobog's scientific academia. By that point, I will not be the Regin everyone knows!

t_ch: （这里应该就是路灯下面了…但好像都挺「正常」的？）
t_en: (This is beneath the streetlamp... but everything seems "normal"?)

t_ch: （不过根据之前几次的经验，「正常」也是一种「异常」，还是再勘测一下。）
t_en: (But according to the past few experiences, "normal" can be a form of "abnormal." I should check it thoroughly.)

t_ch: （路灯之下的异常…难道说的是那群小孩子附近？再去听听看他们在干什么吧。）
t_en: (The anomaly beneath the streetlamp... Is it near the kids over there? I'll go and see what they're doing.)

t_ch: 精彩！打得太精彩了！我都不困了！
t_en: Wow! This is interesting! I'm not even sleepy anymore!

t_ch: 这不比听科学研究有意思？你收我为徒吧！
t_en: Isn't this so much more interesting than listening to scientific studies? Take me as your apprentice!

t_ch: 这…大宇宙理论终究是败给了暴力的武器！
t_en: So... the big universe theory lost to weapons of violence!

t_ch: （这个声音…「异常」应该就在附近。）
t_en: (This sound... the "anomaly" should be close by.)

t_ch: （售货机里的商品之前没有见到过，再仔细看看到底是什么。）
t_en: (You've never seen these goods being sold in the vending machine. Take a closer look at what they are.)

t_ch: 你真的没有孪生兄弟吗？
t_en: Do you really not have a twin brother?

t_ch: 为什么你会问这个问题？难道你见到了一个长得很像我的人？
t_en: Why would you ask a question like this? Did you meet someone who looks like me?

t_ch: 这没啥奇怪的，贝洛伯格人长相多少有点相同！你应该是看错了，我可没有孪生兄弟。
t_en: This isn't surprising. Most Belobogians look similar in one way or another! You must've been mistaken, I don't have a twin brother.

t_ch: 会不会是平行世界的你…
t_en: Could it be you from a parallel universe?

t_ch: 平行世界？你还真是富有想象力！不过那种设想不属于我的研究领域。
t_en: Parallel universe? You're so imaginative! But that kind of hypothesis is not within my research area.

t_ch: 哎…你是不是还没从之前的异常勘测中恢复过来呀？不然还是老实休息吧？
t_en: Hey, have you not recovered from your anomaly detection earlier? Why don't you take more rest?

t_ch: 那个异常现象变成了你！
t_en: That anomaly turned into you!

t_ch: 啊！你这是什么阴谋论啊！异常现象不是那个什么…什么噗蛮吗？怎么会变成我呢？
t_en: Ah! What is this conspiracy theory!? Isn't the anomaly that... that Trodder thing? How did it turn into me?

t_ch: 哎呀，你呀你，科学不能基于幻想做延展，这个思想很危险啊！
t_en: Oh, hey, you um... Science cannot be based solely on the extension of imagination, that mindset is dangerous!

t_ch: 哎，应该就是那帮老家伙嫉妒我的才华，故意针对我吧！天才就是要背负这样的压力…我了解！
t_en: *sigh* It must be the act of those old guards being jealous of my talents. They must be deliberately targeting me! Such is the pressure a genius faces... I can understand!

t_ch: 看你的样子还算正常我就放心了。要是你出了啥意外，恐怕铁卫也不会放过我。
t_en: I'm relieved to see you're doing alright. The Silvermane Guards probably wouldn't let me go if something were to happen to you.

t_ch: 至于感应仪的事儿…哎！说来我就一肚子气！
t_en: As for the sensor... I'm so mad!

t_ch: 那帮老家伙，居然说我之前已经提交过一份类似的论文，还全都是错别字，让我别再添乱了！
t_en: Those old geezers said I had already submitted a similar paper and that it was full of typos. They said I should stop creating trouble for them!

t_ch: 你自己看看，我这「研究笔记」内容清清楚楚，怎么可能全是错别字呢？
t_en: Just look at this! My research notes are perfectly clear. How can there be typos?

t_ch: 我怀疑，应该就是那个「异常」偷走了我的笔记，卖给了某个没文化的势利眼，誊抄整理的过程中就暴露了他的无知！
t_en: I suspect that "anomaly" stole my notes and sold them to some uneducated brute, and their ignorance was exposed when they copied the notes!

t_ch: 真后悔，要是你头一回给我手稿残页的时候，我就提高警惕该多好！
t_en: I wish I took more steps to protect myself back when you first gave me the note pieces!

t_ch: 不过，那些个「异常」到底把我的手稿卖给谁了？这家伙，未来就是我雷金的头号眼中钉！
t_en: But who did that "anomaly" sell my notes to? I'm gonna hunt that person down!

t_ch: 以后我肯定会守护好我的研究笔记，再也不会让它们抢走了！
t_en: I'm gonna protect my research notes extremely well now. They won't ever be stolen again!

t_ch: 哎！灵感突然进入了我的大脑…这个坐标，感觉像是某种和<color=#dbc291ff>「冰雪」</color>有关的…我说不准具体是啥，你就当听个想法吧！
t_en: Oh! I feel an intuition coming into my brain... This coordinate feels like it's something to do with "<color=#dbc291ff>ice</color>"... I can't tell what it is. Count it as a tip from me!

t_ch: 哎！灵感突然进入了我的大脑…这个坐标，感觉像是某种和「色彩」有关的<color=#dbc291ff>「变化图案」</color>…我不好说，你就当是我的小小建议吧！
t_en: Oh! I feel an intuition coming into my brain... This coordinate feels like it's something to do with "<color=#dbc291ff>changing shapes</color>" and "colors"... I can't tell what it is. Count it as a tip from me!

t_ch: 哎！灵感突然进入了我的大脑…这个坐标，感觉像是某种和<color=#dbc291ff>「钥匙」</color>有关的…我说不准具体是啥，你就当听个想法吧！
t_en: Oh! I feel an intuition coming into my brain... This coordinate feels like it's something to do with "<color=#dbc291ff>keys</color>"... I can't tell what it is. Count it as a tip from me!

t_ch: 哎！灵感突然进入了我的大脑…这个坐标，感觉像是某种和<color=#dbc291ff>「影像」</color>有关的「设备」…我说不准具体是啥，你就当听个想法吧！
t_en: Oh! I feel an intuition coming into my brain... This coordinate feels like it's an "equipment" that's got to do with "<color=#dbc291ff>images</color>"... I can't tell what it is. Count it as a tip from me!

t_ch: 哎！灵感突然进入了我的大脑…这个坐标，感觉像是某种和<color=#dbc291ff>「住所」</color>有关的…我说不准具体是啥，你就当听个想法吧！
t_en: Oh! I feel an intuition coming into my brain... This coordinate feels like it's something to do with "<color=#dbc291ff>residences</color>"... I can't tell what it is. Count it as a tip from me!

t_ch: 哎！留步！这次的灵感让我「头皮发麻」…啊！这种熟悉的陌生感让人好难受。我要缓会儿，你先走吧！
t_en: Ah! Stop! The intuition this time makes my scalp tingle... Ah! This feeling of déjà vu is so weird. I need to rest for a bit. You go on!

t_ch: 开启博物馆经营
t_en: Start Museum Management

t_ch: {NICKNAME}，我听艾丽斯小姐说了，你打理起博物馆相关的事务得心应手，简直就像个熟练经理人——真令人佩服！
t_en: {NICKNAME}, Eris told me you managed the museum so well that it was as though you had done it for years. I'm impressed!

t_ch: 出于成本控制的缘由，我们之前计划只开放综合馆的外部展区…不过以目前的进度来看，综合馆的内部区域应该也可以对公众开放了。
t_en: Previously, we planned to only open the external area of the General Hall to manage the costs... Now that we're doing so well, I think it's time we open the internal area to the public.

t_ch: 那就这么决定了，{NICKNAME}经理！希望在你的协助下，博物馆能实现稳步复兴。
t_en: Let's do it, Manager {NICKNAME}! I hope the museum will be revived steadily with your help!

t_ch: 去找艾丽斯小姐吧，她会告诉你该如何同时经营多个展区的。加油！
t_en: Go ahead and talk to Eris. She will tell you how to manage multiple exhibition areas simultaneously. Keep up the good work!

t_ch: 真是不可思议…{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，在您的帮助下，历史文化博物馆已经成为贝洛伯格最热闹的景点了！
t_en: How unexpected... {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, with your help, the History and Culture Museum has become the most popular spot in Belobog!

t_ch: 在黄金歌剧院工作的朋友还和我抱怨，说最近大家闲时消遣都爱往博物馆钻，连去看歌剧的观众都变少了……
t_en: A friend of mine who works at the Golden Theater was ranting to me about how everyone spends their free time going to the museum that even the number of opera-goers has decreased...

t_ch: 看着您工作的身姿，让我又找回了最初申请来博物馆工作时的热情。谢谢您，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}！
t_en: Watching you work, I feel like I've re-ignited the passion I had when I first applied to work at the museum. Thank you, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}!

t_ch: 未来的经营工作就请交给我吧。您忙碌了这么久，也该有时间欣赏一下自己给这座博物馆带来的变化了。
t_en: Leave the future management work to me. You have been busy for so long, you should have the time to appreciate the changes you have brought to this museum.

t_ch: 希望我们以后还能常见，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
t_en: I hope we can see you often, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}.

t_ch: 馆长于尔丹先生好像在找您…完成他的委托之后再继续经营吧？
t_en: Curator Uldan seems to be looking for you... Why don't you continue operating the museum after completing his assignment?

t_ch: 听说这里在做活动？
t_en: I heard there's an event going on here?

t_ch: 你来得刚好！我们确实在做活动：买一块蛋糕，送一个杰伊特制皮皮西笑话！
t_en: Perfect timing! We do have an event going on: Buy a slice of cake, and you'll receive a special Pepeshi joke from Jay as a complimentary treat!

t_ch: 我看到宣传短信了。
t_en: I saw the promotional message.

t_ch: 真可惜，你错过了匹诺康尼下一位脱口秀大师的出场秀！
t_en: What a pity. You missed the debut show of the next stand-up comedy mater in Penacony!

t_ch: 那我单点一个笑话。
t_en: In that case, I'll just order a joke.

t_ch: 咳咳——哎呦，忘词儿了。
t_en: Ahem... Oops, I forgot the lines.

t_ch: 杰伊特制笑话仍在烹饪中，我还是先给你介绍一下餐厅的活动吧。
t_en: The Jay's special joke is still in the making, so let me introduce you to the restaurant's activities.

t_ch: （转身走人）
t_en: (Turns to leave)

t_ch: 哎呦别走，别走啊！咱们餐厅还是有正经活动的！
t_en: Hey, don't go! We have some legitimate activities in our restaurant!

t_ch: 「十二时刻商业区联合举办，年度感恩大酬宾！」——这是一年一次的美食庆典，你准备食材，我们为你加工美味。
t_en: Twelve Hours Commercial District is joining forces to host the annual celebration as thanks to our customers! It's an annual culinary festival where you provide the ingredients and we'll whip up delicious dishes for you.

t_ch: 得益于家族最新研发的梦泡压缩技术，我们得以将那些只存在于梦境中的独特风味带到现实。「仰望星空」蛋糕、「鲱鱼先生」柠檬挞…只要你想要，没有我们提供不了的美味！
t_en: Thanks to The Family's latest Dream Bubble Compression technology, we can now bring unique dream-inspired flavors that used to exist only in Dreamscape to reality. Whether it's the Stargazer cake or Mr. Herring's lemon tart, there's no delectable dish beyond our reach!

t_ch: 至于其他的…完蛋，我又忘词了……短信上还说有啥活动来着？
t_en: As for the others... Oh dear, I forgot the lines again... What did the message say about the activities?

t_ch: 买一送二？
t_en: Buy one, get two free?

t_ch: 邮寄送礼？
t_en: Mailing gifts?

t_ch: 哦没错！还有这条——参与活动即可获得多份实体化的匹诺康尼美食，你可以将它直接寄给自己在其他星系的好友，让他们也体验一下梦境特色风味。
t_en: Oh, that's right! Here's another one — participating in the event earns you various materialized Penacony delicacies. You can have them shipped directly to your friends in other star systems, allowing them to savor the dream-inspired flavors.

t_ch: 比如今天的活动餐品：「交叠的美梦」！
t_en: Such as today's featured dish: Interwoven Dreams!

t_ch: 以一百位顾客最甜美的梦境为灵感，层叠交织出冰淇淋绵密浓郁的口感——这就是甜点好评榜排行第一的「零卡百层圣代」。
t_en: Inspired by the sweetest dreams of a hundred customers, the Zero-Calorie Hundred-Layer Sundae layers and weaves together to create a rich and indulgent ice cream texture, securing its top position on the dessert reviews list.

t_ch: …虽然只能还原部分口感，但有限的美味才更加迷人，不是吗？
t_en: ...Although it can only replicate some of the textures, the limited flavors are even more enchanting, wouldn't you agree?

t_ch: 听起来不错，我想试试！
t_en: Sounds good, I'd like to try it!

t_ch: 太好了！真希望下次听笑话时你也这么爽快。
t_en: That's great! I hope you'll be just as delighted the next time you hear a joke.

t_ch: …下次一定。
t_en: ...I'll make sure to be.

t_ch: 听起来有点忽悠人…
t_en: That sounds a bit fake...

t_ch: 哎呦老朋友别走别走别走——来玩玩吧！说不定老板看着热闹高兴了涨涨工资，我就能早日脱离服务员生涯了！
t_en: Hey, my friend, don't go, don't go just yet — come and join the fun! If the boss sees the place buzzing and gets in a good mood, I might snag a raise and bid farewell to my waiter days soon! You never know!

t_ch: 请拿好你的参与奖励——哦！看来你的朋友们也收到这份特别礼品了。
t_en: Please accept your participation reward — Oh! It looks like your friends have received this special gift as well.

t_ch: 感恩庆典活动会持续七天，每天都会提供不同美食，你可以随时过来参加。
t_en: The celebration event will last for seven days, with different delicacies offered each day. Feel free to drop by anytime to participate.

t_ch: 具体都有什么？
t_en: What exactly will be available?

t_ch: 这是本次活动的宣传单，一天一款特色美食，打卡满七次还可以兑换特别好礼哦~
t_en: Here's the promotional flyer for the event. Each day features a unique specialty dish. You can redeem a special gift if you check in for all seven days!

t_ch: 基本就是这样。我要去琢磨新段子了，有问题再说！
t_en: That's the gist of it. I'm off to work on some new jokes now. Let me know if you have any questions!

t_ch: 哎呀，客人你提供的食材量不够呀。
t_en: Oh dear, it seems you haven't provided enough ingredients.

t_ch: 关于美食庆典…
t_en: About the food fest...

t_ch: 今日的礼品已寄出去咯，客人你还想玩的话就等明天再来吧！
t_en: Today's gift has already been shipped out. If you want to join the fun again, come back tomorrow, my dear guest!

t_ch: 今日份的食材已经准备好了吗？
t_en: Is today's set of ingredients ready?

t_ch: 关于美食庆典…
t_en: About the food fest...

t_ch: 我准备了一个关于「酸梦」牌糖果的新故事，你要不要听听看？
t_en: I've prepared a new story about "Sour Dreams" soft candy. Would you like to hear it?

t_ch: 很久很久以前，有个小女孩靠卖酸梦糖维持生计。她每天都站在广场附近叫卖：「便宜好吃的酸梦糖，一颗就能忘记饥饿。快来买呀，快来买呀——」
t_en: Once upon a time, there was a young girl who made a living by selling Sour Dream soft candies. Each day, she would stand near the square, hawking, "Affordable and scrumptious Sour Dream soft candies, one bite and hunger fades away. Come and get 'em, come and get 'em—"

t_ch: 总觉得这个故事在哪听过？
t_en: I feel like I've heard this story somewhere before.

t_ch: 嘘，别打岔，故事还没讲完呢！
t_en: Shh, don't interrupt. The story isn't finished yet!

t_ch: 在某个饥寒交迫的夜晚，卖不掉酸梦糖的小女孩决定以糖果充饥，她吃了一颗又一颗，极致的酸甜让她眼前产生了幻觉：华丽的房间、温暖的壁炉、香气四溢的大餐，她忍不住向幻觉伸手，然后……
t_en: On a particularly cold and hungry night, the young girl who couldn't sell her Sour Dream soft candies decided to satisfy her hunger with the candies. She ate one after another, and the extreme sweetness and sourness created hallucinations before her eyes: A magnificent room, a warm fireplace, and a delicious feast. She couldn't resist reaching out to the illusion, and then—

t_ch: 发现美梦破灭了？
t_en: Did her beautiful dream shatter?

t_ch: 可惜，那些美景都是真实存在的——她因为酸梦糖吃的太多，不小心从定制的梦泡中酸醒了！哈哈！
t_en: Unfortunately, those beautiful scenes were all real — she had eaten too many Sour Dream soft candies and accidentally woke up from the customized dream bubble! Ha-ha!

t_ch: 怎么，不好笑吗？这可是某个客人跟我讲的真人真事！不过梦泡难得，酸梦糖还是很好做的——
t_en: Aren't you amused? This is an actual story a guest shared with me! But dream bubbles are rare, and making Sour Dream soft candies is relatively straightforward—

t_ch: 嘿朋友，你听说过「仰望星空」吗？
t_en: Hey, friend, ever heard of Stargazer?

t_ch: 这是匹诺康尼最经典的传统小吃之一。传闻这种做法最早诞生于大逐梦时期，由伟大逐梦客「钟表匠」发明：在物质匮乏的梦境开拓时代，一份切片蛋糕就是劳动后最好的犒劳。
t_en: It's one of Penacony's most classic traditional snacks. Legend has it that this method was originally created during the age of the Great Dream Expedition by the renowned Dreamchaser known as the Watchmaker. In a time when resources were scarce during dream exploration, a slice of cake served as the ultimate reward after a day's labor.

t_ch: 为了纪念「钟表匠」的伟大功业，我们将这份食谱连同它的口味再度还原——成为了今天的「仰望星空」蛋糕！
t_en: To commemorate the great achievements of Watchmaker, we've recreated this recipe along with its flavor — giving birth to today's Stargazer cake!

t_en: About the food fest...

t_ch: 无数伟大的脱口秀都源于其表演者上台前喝下的那一小口美妙甘露——没错，今天的活动餐品正是匹诺康尼的传奇饮料，「经典苏乐达」！
t_en: Countless great stand-up comedy acts have been born from a small sip of divine nectar imbibed by the performer before going on stage — yes, today's featured item is Penacony's legendary drink, the Classic SoulGlad!

t_ch: 我听过一个小道消息：似乎苏乐达的创始人并不是如今人们熟知的艾迪恩老板，而是一个名为苏萨的星际囚犯！
t_en: I've heard an obscure gossip: The founder of SoulGlad wasn't Aideen, the owner we all know today, but rather a cosmic prisoner named Sousa!

t_ch: 不过事到如今，苏乐达早已不只是一款饮料，它所代表的糖浆主义已经渗入了匹诺康尼的方方面面，每个脱口秀演员都离不开它——要我说，谁还在乎那创始人是谁呢！
t_en: But at this point, SoulGlad is more than just a drink. It embodies the syrupism that has seeped into every corner of Penacony. Every stand-up comedian relies on it. Who cares about the founder anymore!

t_ch: 「向你致敬，我的朋友！」
t_en: "Cheers, my friend!"

t_ch: 也向你致敬，我的朋友！
t_en: Here's to you as well, my friend!

t_ch: 嘿嘿，还得是「鲱鱼先生」的广告词最有趣！
t_en: Hehe, Mr. Herring's has the most amusing tagline!

t_ch: 这是个笑话？
t_en: Is this a joke?

t_ch: 当然不是！天哪，你真是缺了点幽默细胞…这可是「鲱鱼先生」柠檬挞的广告词啊！
t_en: Certainly not! Oh my, you're seriously lacking a sense of humor... That's the tagline for Mr. Herring's lemon tart!

t_ch: 这是大逐梦时期后最受欢迎、也是最具匹诺康尼精神的创意餐品——鲱鱼先生畅游在红鱼子与柠檬果酱中，向每一位来到梦境的客人问好，「向你致敬，我的朋友！记得享受当下！」
t_en: This is the most popular creative dish after the Great Dream Expedition, and one that quintessentially represents the spirit of Penacony the most. Mr. Herring's swims in a sea of red caviar and lemon sauce, greeting every guest in Dreamscape with a hearty, "Cheers, my friend! Remember to savor the moment!"

t_ch: 也感谢主厨最终决定把它从一道主菜改为一道甜品。说真的，你不会想在柠檬挞里吃到一只真鲱鱼的。
t_en: And we're thankful that the head chef ultimately turned it into a dessert and not a main course. Honestly, you wouldn't want an actual herring in your lemon tart.

t_ch: 你了解过本餐厅的招牌美食「钟表披萨」吗？
t_en: Have you ever heard of our restaurant's signature dish, the Clockie Pizza?

t_ch: 披萨，最便捷的美味，最直接的热量！每份<unbreak>12</unbreak>片，足够四个皮皮西人吃上一整天！
t_en: Pizza is the epitome of convenient delight and a direct source of calories! Each serving comes with <unbreak>12</unbreak> slices, enough to keep four Pepeshi folks satisfied for an entire day!

t_ch: 最初，只有那些在折纸大学上课的筑梦师们吃披萨，他们喜欢以这种手拿式的快餐充饥。但人们很快就发现圆形披萨的社交作用——现在，它已经是所有宴会上必不可缺的派对美食了。
t_en: Initially, it was only the Dreamweavers attending classes at Paperfold University who indulged in pizza. They favored this handheld fast food for a quick bite. However, people soon realized the social significance of circular pizza — now it's become an indispensable party delicacy at all gatherings.

t_ch: 但…天哪，真有人能凑够<unbreak>12</unbreak>个朋友出来吃披萨吗？
t_en: But... Oh my, can anyone really round up <unbreak>12</unbreak> friends to share a pizza?

t_ch: 我有。
t_en: I can.

t_ch: 我也没有…
t_en: Well, not really...

t_ch: 我一个人吃整份！
t_en: I can finish the whole serving by myself!

t_ch: 无论如何，我们贴心地为你准备了单人份钟表披萨！编号随机，即使没朋友也可以愉快享用~
t_en: Anyway, we've thoughtfully prepared a single serving of Clockie Pizza for you! The numbers are random, so you can enjoy it even if you don't have any friends.

t_en: About the food fest...

t_ch: 酸的…甜的…苦的…哎呦，这颗好像是苏乐达味的！
t_en: Sour... sweet... bitter... Oh, this one appears to carry the taste of SoulGlad!

t_ch: 你在干嘛？
t_en: What are you doing?

t_ch: 朋友，你来得正好！快来试试最近新出的多味糖，每颗都不一样，每颗都有惊喜~
t_en: Friend, you've come just in time! Give the newly released mixed-flavor candy a try. Each candy is unique and promises a delightful surprise!

t_ch: （吃红色花纹的）
t_en: (Eat the candy with crimson swirls)

t_ch: 浓郁的奶油草莓味瞬间在你口中爆开，过于馥郁的甜味几乎让思绪都停摆一秒。
t_en: The rich and creamy strawberry flavor instantly bursts in your mouth, and the exceptionally sweet taste nearly causes your mind to pause for a moment.

t_ch: （吃绿色花纹的）
t_en: (Eat the candy with green swirls)

t_ch: 新鲜的青草、雨后的泥土、秋季的落叶…似乎短短一秒，你就从这颗糖上品味道了某颗植物的一生。
t_en: Fresh grass, rain-soaked earth, autumn leaves... In a mere second, it's as if you've tasted the entire life of a particular plant through the taste of this candy.

t_ch: （吃紫色花纹的）
t_en: (Eat the candy with purple swirls)

t_ch: 这是一颗跳跳糖，但那在你舌尖蹦跳的节奏似乎颇有规律，你甚至觉得它们在你耳边组成了一只摇滚乐队——不算太吵的那种。
t_en: This candy bounces on your tongue with a surprisingly regular rhythm, and it even feels like they're forming a rock band in your ear — not too loud, though.

t_ch: 先不吃了。
t_en: I'll pass for now.

t_ch: 真可惜，这一颗的口感真的很有趣——当然，没我的笑话有趣。
t_en: What a pity, the texture of this one is really interesting — of course, not as interesting as my jokes.

t_ch: 请允许我介绍本次美食庆典的压轴之作：「彩梦」什锦糖果！
t_en: Please allow me to introduce the grand finale of this gourmet festival: The "Dreamlight" Mixed Sweets!

t_ch: 这绝对是会影响匹诺康尼甜点史的伟大作品。它就像枚微型梦泡，一颗就是一小段新体验，比梦泡更快速也更安全。
t_en: This is undoubtedly a masterpiece that will influence the confectionary history of Penacony. It's like a miniature dream bubble, each piece offering a new experience, quicker and safer than dream bubbles.

t_ch: 我已经能预见它恐怖的销量了！
t_en: I can already foresee its terrifying sales!

t_ch: 关于美食庆典…
t_en: About the food fest...

t_ch: 今日的礼品已寄出去咯，客人你还想玩的话就等明天再来吧！
t_en: Today's gift has already been shipped out. If you want to join the fun again, come back tomorrow, my dear guest!

t_en: Oh dear, it seems you haven't provided enough ingredients.

t_ch: 今日份的食材已经准备好了吗？
t_en: Is today's set of ingredients ready?

t_ch: 以上就是参与本届美食庆典的所有餐品了，感谢您一贯对商业街与钟表餐厅的大力支持，咱们明年再会！
t_en: Those are all the dishes featured in this year's festival. Thank you for your ongoing support of the Business District and Clock Diner. See you next year!

t_ch: 等等，我的特别好礼！
t_en: Wait, what about my special reward?

t_ch: 哦对，差点给忘了。
t_en: Oh yeah, I almost forgot.

t_ch: 我们为所有参加完整七日活动的顾客准备了特殊礼品：免费的「彩梦」什锦糖体验装一份！
t_en: We have a special treat for all customers who completed the entire seven-day event: A complimentary "Dreamlight" Mixed Sweets experience kit!

t_ch: 您可以选择寄送对象，我们会帮你直接送至对方手中。
t_en: You may select a recipient, and we'll deliver it directly to them.

t_ch: （来自匹诺康尼的特产美食…该送给谁好呢……？）
t_en: (A specialty food from Penacony... Who should I send it to...?)

t_ch: 从未离开列车的帕姆
t_en: Pom-Pom, who can never leave the Express

t_ch: 留下看守列车的丹恒
t_en: Dan Heng, who is guarding the Express

t_ch: 一直照顾大家的杨叔
t_en: Mr. Yang, who has been looking after everyone

t_ch: 特殊礼品已为您寄出！如果您还想购置更多特产，可以咨询酒店员工，我们同样提供上门送货服务。
t_en: Your special gift has been dispatched! Should you wish to acquire additional specialties, feel free to consult our hotel staff. We also provide delivery services.

t_ch: 好嘞，到点下班，该去准备「奇异果」的第十二次投稿了…
t_en: All right, it's time to call it a day and prepare for the twelfth submission to the Kiwis...

t_ch: 感谢你的参与——礼品寄送已完成，记得明天再来啊！
t_en: Thank you for your participation! Your gift has been sent. Please come again tomorrow!

t_ch: 星穹列车的开拓客，又见面了！
t_en: Trailblazer from the Astral Express, we meet again!

t_ch: 不来爱德华医生的梦境贩售店看看吗？我这里又有一批新梦泡上市了——
t_en: Fancy a visit to my Dreamscape Sales Store? I have a new batch of dream bubbles coming to the shelf...

t_ch: ——是个相当劲爆的题材，体验过的客人全都好评如潮…保准符合您的口味！
t_en: The batch has a pretty exciting theme. Those who have tried it are full of praise... I'm sure you'll like it!

t_ch: 是战争题材吗？
t_en: Is it about war?

t_ch: 是情感题材吗？
t_en: Is it about relationships?

t_ch: 是捡垃圾题材吗？
t_en: Is it about garbage picking?

t_ch: 哈哈，我就知道您肯定会感兴趣！还记得本店的标语吗？「爱德华医生比您更了解您内心的喜好！」
t_en: Haha, I knew you would be interested! Still remember the slogan of my store? "Dr. Edward knows more about your preferences than you do!"

t_ch: 不过这里容我暂且卖个关子，毕竟现在每多说一个字都算是一种剧透。这梦泡的内容，还请客人您亲自体验吧！
t_en: Please allow me to keep the suspense going for now, as I don't want to give any spoilers. You'll have to enter the dream bubble yourself to find out what it's about!

t_ch: 嘿，醒醒，别发呆了。
t_en: Hey, you need to snap out of it.

t_ch: 你动作好慢啊，车…我是说球笼都准备好了。大部队已经基本撤离，我们差不多也该跟上了。
t_en: You're moving too slowly. The car... I mean, the spheroid is all set. Everyone else has left, and we should catch up soon.

t_ch: 我这是在哪儿？
t_en: Where am I?

t_ch: 美梦小镇的监狱啊。难道你以为自己已经自由了？
t_en: The Dreamville prison. Do you actually think you're already a free man?

t_ch: 我们要去哪儿？
t_en: Where are we heading?

t_ch: 逃狱啊。难道你以为自己已经自由了？
t_en: We're breaking out of prison. Do you actually think you're already a free man?

t_ch: 一周前，当上典狱长的石头老板宣布将苏乐达列为禁品——当时你可是愤怒到对空气挥拳、险些打坏吊灯啊。
t_en: A week ago, Boss Stone became the Prison Warden and listed SoulGlad as contraband. You flipped out over that decision so much that you kept punching the air and nearly broke the chandelier.

t_ch: 从那时起，咱们就计划好要给他们一个教训了。现在正是难得的机会。
t_en: We decided to teach them a lesson at that time. Now, the best opportunity has come.

t_ch: 我懂了，你在交代背景设定。
t_en: Ha, I got it! You're now doing the exposition!

t_ch: 什么背景设定？你今天说话好怪啊。算了……
t_en: What exposition? There's something off about you today. Forget it...

t_ch: 不让喝苏乐达的都是坏人！
t_en: Whoever prohibited SoulGlad must be the bad guy!

t_ch: 说的是啊！所以兄弟们才要逃狱嘛。
t_en: Exactly! That's why we decided to get out of this place.

t_ch: 坏消息是，那些狱卒刚刚破坏了航道，我们必须手动调整路线才能继续前进。
t_en: The bad news is that the prison guards have just damaged the track. We need to fix it manually to proceed.

t_ch: 听说你进来之前有两把刷子。修复工作就交给你了，我去为你打掩护。咱们汇合点再见。
t_en: I heard you were good at these things, so I'll leave the repair work to you. I'll cover for you. See you at the meeting point later.

t_ch: 不错嘛，你还真有两把刷子。咱们都成功活下来了。
t_en: Wow, you really know your stuff! We have both made it.

t_ch: 那群狱卒的手段肯定不止这些，前面还会有更多障碍的。
t_en: I bet those prison guards have more tricks up their sleeves. There will be more obstacles waiting for us ahead.

t_ch: 继续前进吧。为了自由，为了苏乐达！
t_en: Let's move forward. For freedom! For SoulGlad!

t_ch: 当心，这片区域的障碍物比之前更多。
t_en: Watch out. There are more obstacles in this area than before.

t_ch: 我们成功了。看，是哈努老大！哈努老大亲自来接应我们了！
t_en: We made it! Look, it's Boss Hanu! He's here to pick us up!

t_ch: 球笼已经运行到了尽头。哈努兄弟，美梦小镇最著名的人物之一，正抖动自己的大鼻子对你们表示欢迎。
t_en: The Spheroid reaches the end of its track. Hanu, one of the most famous figures in Dreamville, is twitching his big nose to welcome you.
*Hmph*

t_ch: 哈努兄弟发出了一声很酷的「哼」，看来他明白该如何表现得像个高手。
t_en: Hanu lets out a snort in an attempt to sound cool. He seems to know very well how to behave to come across as a big shot.

t_ch: 哈努老大说，感谢你们为大家殿后。所有伙伴都安全逃了出来。
t_en: Boss Hanu appreciates you two for providing cover for us. Everyone has made it out safely.

t_ch: 我们的下一步计划是解救其他监狱分区内的囚犯，将他们收作同伴、壮大队伍。也许有一天，我们能彻底打碎身上的枷锁。
t_en: Next, we plan to free the prisoners from other divisions and take them in to expand our team. Perhaps, we can break free from our chains for good one day.

t_ch: 为了美梦小镇的福祉，让我们今后也继续并肩奋战吧！
t_en: Let's work hard together for a better Dreamville!

t_ch: 逃亡行动成功后，哈努兄弟决定向其他囚犯伸出援手，以此拉拢他们加入反抗监狱的队伍。
t_en: After a successful prison break, Brother Hanu decided to reach out to the other prisoners as a means of recruiting them into the resistance against the prison.

t_ch: 大量物资源源不断地送进了临近的分区：食物、武器、服装…当然，还有最重要的苏乐达。
t_en: A steady flow of supplies that include food, weapons, clothing, and most importantly, SoulGlad is provided to the neighboring division.

t_ch: 而你接到的任务，便是用通风口运送一批新交付的苏乐达……
t_en: You are assigned with the mission of delivering a batch of newly arrived SoulGlad through the vent...

t_ch: 你成功交付了这批苏乐达，但监狱的严打并未因此减弱——隔壁分区的狱卒每天都会打开牢房，搜出一瓶又一瓶苏乐达，然后将它们尽数摔碎。
t_en: The batch of SoulGlad is successfully delivered, but the crackdown on SoulGlad within the prison has yet to abate. The prison guards carry out spot checks in the cells every day, confiscate bottle after bottle of SoulGlad, and then smash them all.

t_ch: 不满开始积攒。只要假以时日，它终会演变成怒火……
t_en: Discontentment among the prisoners is growing. Over time, it will soon escalate into anger...

t_ch: 在哈努兄弟的授意下，你和同伴们将成箱的苏乐达偷运进隔壁的监狱区划。
t_en: With Brother Hanu's permission, you and your companions smuggle crates of SoulGlad into the neighboring prison block.

t_ch: 这带有甜味的汽水让囚犯们的精神大为提振，就像在黑暗中看到了光……
t_en: The sweetness of the soda lifts the spirits of the inmates — as if they can see the light in the darkness...

t_ch: 苏乐达走私运动持续了六个月，囚犯和狱卒们的拉锯战每天都在上演——刚拿到的苏乐达还没来得及喝就被抢走，咒骂与哀求声充斥着牢房内外。
t_en: The SoulGlad smuggling operation lasted for six months, with a daily tug-of-war between the prisoners and the guards. Newly acquired SoulGlad was snatched away before consumed, filling the cell with the sounds of cursing and pleading.

t_ch: 新入手的冰镇苏乐达还没来得及喝就被抢走，咒骂与哀求声不绝于耳。
t_en: The sound of the prisoners cursing and begging can be heard all the time. Their nicely chilled SoulGlad is seized before they even manage to take a sip.

t_ch: 就这样，隔壁区划的压力逐渐到达顶峰，只差一粒火星就要爆发……
t_en: Just like that, the feeling of displeasure in the neighboring division reaches an all-time high. A spark is all it needs to erupt...

t_ch: 深层梦境的全部章节都已为您解锁，您可以尽情选择想要游玩的关卡。
t_en: All chapters of Deep Dreamscape have been unlocked for you. You are free to choose the stage you want to play.

t_ch: 这些关卡比较有挑战性。如果被某一关难住了，不妨先去其他的章节换换思维哟。
t_en: These stages are more challenging. If you're stuck somewhere, you can visit another chapter for a change.

t_ch: 欢迎光临梦境贩售店，爱德华医生竭诚为您服务！
t_en: Welcome to Dreamscape Sales Store! Dr. Edward at your service!

t_ch: 此时此刻，您想体验一个什么滋味的梦境？
t_en: What kind of a dream would you like to experience now?

t_ch: 又一批苏乐达被大规模破坏后，囚犯们的怒火爆发了。
t_en: After another batch of SoulGlad is destroyed, the inmates see red.

t_ch: 有人发出了第一声呐喊，随后众人热烈响应。监狱内的暴力行为数量飞增，动乱波及了整个分区……
t_en: Following the first cry of rebellion, the other inmates respond enthusiastically. The number of violent incidents in the prison skyrockets, plunging the entire division into pandemonium...

t_ch: 你们趁机发出邀请，反抗队伍扩大到了前所未有的地步。对自由和美好的追求感染了每一个人……
t_en: You and your team take advantage of the chaotic situation to invite the prisoners, and the number of rebels grows rapidly. Everyone's desire for freedom and a better life has been awakened.

t_ch: 总之，我要先去为哈努兄弟助力了，你也赶快跟上吧。
t_en: Anyway, I'll go ahead and help Brother Hanu. You should hurry along.

t_ch: 你来了，伙计。有一个好消息和一个坏消息，我先讲好的。
t_en: Hey, buddy. I have good news and bad news. Let me tell you the good one first.

t_ch: 多亏之前的那步奇招，我们已经占领了整个美梦小镇监狱一半的分区。石头老板和他手下那群饭桶再也没可能把我们抓回牢房里去了。
t_en: Thanks to that unusual move we pulled off earlier, we've taken over half of the prison in Dreamville. Boss Stone and his underlings can never take us back to the prison again.

t_ch: 坏消息是，他们依旧手握监狱系统的控制权。如今我们半区的生产设施基本停运，所有出口也都被隔离门封锁了。照这么下去，大伙很快就会支撑不住……
t_en: The bad news is, they are still in control of the prison system. The production facilities in our divisions have stopped operating, and all the exits have been blocked by quarantine gates. If this goes on, we won't be able to hold on for much longer...

t_ch: 必须有人从通风口潜入对面半区的储藏室、取得控制监狱系统的秘钥——试问谁会比哈努兄弟更擅长这项任务呢？
t_en: We need someone to sneak through the vent into the storage room located in the other half of the prison and find the key to the prison system. Obviously, Hanu is the best candidate for this mission.

t_ch: 不过英雄也并非万能，仅凭他一人很难对付整个分区的警卫。所以我们必须通过电视机，将梦境力量传递给他。
t_en: But even a hero like him isn't invincible and can't deal with all the guards by himself. We need to channel the Dreamscape energy to him through the television.

t_ch: 这解释好勉强…
t_en: Sounds like the plot has just jumped the shark...

t_ch: 总之就是要我亲自操作对吧？
t_en: Fine, I'll Do It Myself.

t_ch: （毕竟梦泡还是需要以客人的体验为重——如果哈努兄弟靠着自己把一切都完成了，这部作品不就少了很多可玩内容吗？）
t_en: (After all, first-hand experience is what a dream bubble is all about. If Hanu does all the work, then there will be very little playable content in this dream bubble.)

t_ch: （去体验一下这枚梦泡里的「小小哈努行动」玩法吧。我向您保证，他们的关卡设计相当出色！）
t_en: (I recommend you try the "Hanu's Adventure" stage in this dream bubble. The stage is very well-designed!)

t_ch: 啾，你是来找这把钥匙的吗？
t_en: Tweet, are you looking for this key?

t_ch: 给你吧啾，石头老板一直拖欠我的工资。我可不想再给他卖命了啾！
t_en: Keep it, tweet. Boss Stone has not settled my wages for a long time. I'm not going to work for him anymore, tweet!

t_ch: 我要回去补觉了啾~
t_en: Let me go back to bed, tweet!

t_ch: 我知道你啾，你是掀起这场动乱的哈努兄弟。
t_en: I know who you are, tweet. You're Hanu, the guy who started this turmoil.

t_ch: 我不喜欢战争啾，我希望大家早点握手言和。
t_en: I don't like conflicts, so I hope to see you guys making peace with each other soon.

t_ch: 如果要拿到这把钥匙才能停止纷争的话，那就拿去吧啾。
t_en: If this key can put an end to the conflict, then you can take it, tweet.

t_ch: 哦，是你啊啾——想要打倒石头老板的家伙。巧了啾，我也一早就看那家伙不顺眼。
t_en: Oh, it's you, tweet. You're the guy who wants to take down Boss Stone. What a coincidence! He has rubbed me the wrong way, too.

t_ch: 别误会，这可不是我们能成为同伴的意思啾。我要借你们的手，狠狠削弱那个鳄鱼头，好为我的鸟之帝国开辟道路。
t_en: Don't get me wrong. I'm not saying I'm on your side. I just need you guys to weaken that crocodile so that I can pave my way to the founding of my Bird Empire.

t_ch: 拿走这把钥匙吧啾。只有在你手里，我才能让它完成我的计划。
t_en: Take the key, tweet. I need you to have it for my plan to work out.

t_ch: 别，别伤害我啾…我是被迫才给石头老板干活的！
t_en: D—Don't hurt me, tweet... I'm coerced into working for Boss Stone!

t_ch: 发出一声安慰的*哼*。
t_en: Let out a reassuring grunt.

t_ch: 发出一声不屑的*哼*。
t_en: Let out a disdainful grunt.

t_ch: 发出一声疑惑的*哼*。
t_en: Let out a skeptical grunt.

t_ch: 你，你想要这把秘钥是吧？拿去吧…只要你别伤害我啾。
t_en: Y—You want this key, right? Take it... as long as you don't hurt me, tweet.

t_ch: 啾！原本只是想修缮一下房间里的老旧设备，没想到被压在这里了…感谢你啾。
t_en: Tweet! I just wanted to repair the old equipment in the room, but ended up being trapped here... Thanks for your help, tweet.

t_ch: 看来美梦小镇的危险还没解除，之后我会更小心一点的啾。
t_en: Looks like Dreamville is still not totally safe yet. I'll be more careful in the future, tweet.

t_ch: 啾！我在为美梦小镇开拓边疆呢啾！
t_en: Tweet! I'm expanding the territory of Dreamville, tweet!

t_ch: 至于刚才发生的…是意外啾！我要回去提醒大家啾！
t_en: What happened earlier was... an accident, tweet! I must go back and remind everyone of this hazard!

t_ch: 啾！我才没有被困住，我要继续跟那些坏人干架啾！
t_en: Tweet! Of course I wasn't trapped! I'll keep fighting those bad guys, tweet!

t_ch: 不过英雄也是有极限的…是时候回去休整一下了啾。
t_en: Still, even heroes get tired too... It's time to go back and recuperate, tweet.

t_ch: 啾，迷途的人啊，是你将我从危难中拯救。但是谁又能拯救你的灵魂呢？
t_en: Tweet, you have rescued me from danger, wanderer. However, who's there to rescue your soul?

t_ch: （哦呀，密钥居然被藏在了折纸小鸟身上？真是令人意想不到呢~）
t_en: (The key is hidden on that origami bird! How unexpected!)

t_ch: （不过这样的密钥似乎有许多把，看来得全部集齐才行。）
t_en: (There seem to be many keys like this. I should probably collect them all.)

t_ch: 这里就是通往核心区域的管道了，让我们一起为哈努兄弟助力吧。
t_en: This is the way to the core area. Let's offer our support to Hanu!

t_ch: 哈努兄弟拿到了全部四把钥匙，用它们打开了监狱的电脑核心。
t_en: Hanu has obtained all four keys and used them to open the computer core of the prison.

t_ch: 灯光亮起，所有设备都已宣誓效忠。人们高举苏乐达庆祝，金色的糖浆如雨而下。
t_en: The lights come on, with all the equipment pledging their allegiance. Everyone raises bottles of SoulGlad in celebration while the golden syrup rains down from above.

t_ch: 然而，整座监狱却因此发生了异变……
t_en: Yet, the entire prison is transformed as a result...

t_ch: 我们所做的一切终究是如幻泡影，美好生活仅能在梦中觅得。
t_en: Everything we've done is just an illusion. The pursuit of a better life is only possible in a dream.

t_ch: 前方究竟有怎样残酷的道路在等待着你，我无法想象啾。
t_en: I can hardly imagine how harsh the path ahead of you will be, tweet.

t_ch: 你——准确的说，梦泡的主要角色——揉着发痛的脑袋苏醒过来。
t_en: You — or more precisely — the protagonist of the dream bubble, wake up with a throbbing head.

t_ch: 熟悉的走廊已经变成了截然不同的模样，一同奋战的伙伴们此时也都不见踪影。
t_en: The once-familiar corridors have become completely different, and your companions, who have been fighting alongside you, are nowhere to be found.

t_ch: 你明白，必须有人站出来拯救大家。成为英雄的时候到了。
t_en: You realize that someone has to step up and save everyone. It is time to become a hero.

t_ch: 就在哈努兄弟取得监狱控制权的一瞬，变故发生了：混乱的联觉梦境吞噬了你们，连带着将整座监狱也全部卷了进去，
t_en: Right when Brother Hanu takes control of the prison, an accident occurs: A chaotic Synesthesia Dreamscape engulfs you all, and pulls the entire prison in it.

t_ch: 啊，是你啊。能再次看见一张熟悉的脸可真好。
t_en: Oh, it's you. It's great to see a familiar face again.

t_ch: 真见鬼，监狱怎么突然变成了这个样子？其他人都去哪儿了？
t_en: Woah, what happened to the prison? Where's everybody else?

t_ch: 我不知道。
t_en: I don't know.

t_ch: 似乎被困在别处了。
t_en: I think they are being trapped elsewhere.

t_ch: …看来只能靠自己了。走吧，咱们去找其他人——至少要找到哈努老大，他有团结其他囚犯的办法。
t_en: ...Looks like we're on our own. Let's go find the others, or at least locate Hanu. He has a knack for uniting the other prisoners.

t_ch: 简单收拾过后，你和狱友踏上了寻找哈努兄弟的旅程。
t_en: After a quick cleanup, you and your cellmate begin the journey to find Brother Hanu.

t_ch: 看，是哈努老大他们！但怎么过去呢……
t_en: Look, it's Hanu and the rest! How do we get over there...

t_ch: 哟，你们居然自己找了过来，真让人刮目相看。
t_en: I'm impressed you guys made it here.

t_ch: 现在的情况你们也看到了，整座监狱都变成了一团糟，路不像路、墙不像墙的。唉，这可如何是好……
t_en: As you all can see, the prison is now a total mess. Everything is ruined and destroyed. Alas, what should we do about this...
*Hmph*, *hmph*... *Hmph*!

t_ch: 哈努兄弟一连说了三个「哼」，这大概是他言辞最为激动的一次。
t_en: Hanu grunts three times in a row. This is probably the most agitated he has ever spoken.

t_ch: …是，您说的对。
t_en: ...Yes, you're right.

t_ch: 他说了什么？
t_en: ...Go on.

t_ch: 哈努老大说，这次事件是个意外，但它并不能击败我们。
t_en: Boss Hanu said this was an accident, and it couldn't defeat us.

t_ch: 在过去，苏乐达就是我们的美梦。石头老板想要夺走我们的梦、强迫我们在淤泥里苟活，所以他们被打倒了。而这次，我们也将打倒一切困难！
t_en: Back then, SoulGlad was our dream. Boss Stone took it away and forced us into a life of abject despair, so he and his men were overthrown. This time, we'll do the same and overcome all challenges!

t_ch: 接下来，我们要去寻找其他失散的同伴，然后用自己的意志改变这里，让美梦小镇变成真正的乐园。
t_en: Next, we'll look for our lost companions and transform Dreamville into a true paradise through sheer determination!

t_ch: 他真说了这么多？
t_en: Did he really say all that?

t_ch: 你还挺有文采的。
t_en: He's quite eloquent, huh?

t_ch: 咳，艺术加工必不可少嘛……
t_en: Ahem, it's important to add a little artistic flair to words...

t_ch: 总之，是该出发的时候了。为了自由，为了苏乐达！
t_en: Anyway, it's time we hit the road. For Freedom! For SoulGlad!

t_ch: 就这样，你们和哈努兄弟一同踏上了解救伙伴的旅程。而那是另一个故事了……
t_en: Just like that, the two of you and Hanu embark on a journey of rescuing the other companions. And that will be another story...

t_ch: 恭喜您，您已经体验完了梦泡的全部剧情内容！
t_en: Congratulations on completing the full story in the dream bubble!

t_ch: 如何，这一套下来您有什么感想？
t_en: What do you think of the story?

t_ch: 这些事真的发生过吗？
t_en: Did any of these things happen in real life?

t_ch: 爱德华医生不对梦泡内容的真实性作任何担保——梦就是梦，享受它吧！
t_en: Dr. Edward doesn't give guarantees on the veracity of the dream bubble content. A dream is a dream. Just enjoy it!

t_ch: 非常儿戏…
t_en: It's sloppy...

t_ch: 这就算是成功了，客人！毕竟这里是匹诺康尼，不是历史博物馆！
t_en: The dream bubble is already quite a success, my dear! After all, this is Penacony, not a museum!

t_ch: 还挺有意思的。
t_en: It's quite interesting.

t_ch: 这是对梦泡作品最高规格的赞赏了，感谢您！
t_en: That's the highest praise a dream bubble can get. Thanks!

t_ch: 这枚梦泡仍在测试和开发阶段。关于它的内容，梦泡制作组委托我做些反响调查，所以接下来我会问您几个问题。
t_en: As the dream bubble is still undergoing the testing and development stage, the developers have enlisted my help to carry out a survey regarding its content. Now, I'll ask you a few questions.

t_ch: 您认为，囚犯们暴动的真正原因是什么？
t_en: What do you think was the true reason behind the prisoners' riot?

t_ch: 因为渴望自由。
t_en: The prisoners' desire for freedom.

t_ch: 因为石头老板的压迫。
t_en: Boss Stone's oppression.

t_ch: 因为要喝苏乐达。
t_en: The prisoners' craving for SoulGlad.

t_ch: 嗯…了解。那么您认为，这次反抗成功的关键因素是什么？
t_en: Hmm... Noted. In your opinion, what was the key factor that led to the success of the rebellion?

t_ch: 哈努兄弟的领导。
t_en: Hanu's leadership.

t_ch: 囚犯们齐心协力。
t_en: The prisoners' joint effort.

t_ch: 我有主角光环。
t_en: My plot armor.

t_ch: 我明白了…最后，您认为囚犯们改造美梦小镇的计划成功了吗？
t_en: I see... Lastly, do you believe the prisoners' plan to transform Dreamville would be successful?

t_ch: 成功了。
t_en: Yes.

t_ch: 并没有。
t_en: No.

t_ch: 我不好说，等个DLC先。
t_en: It's hard to say. I'll wait for the upcoming DLC.

t_ch: 哈哈哈，您真幽默。放心，我会把您的需求反馈给制作组的！
t_en: Hahaha, that's funny. Don't worry. I'll pass on your feedback to the developers!

t_ch: 能看出您在体验这枚梦泡时非常认真。不过真实的历史可远不如演绎有趣……
t_en: I can tell you really immersed yourself in the dream bubble. However, true history may not be as interesting...

t_ch: 总之，希望您享受刚才的故事。如果您对这枚梦泡的玩法感兴趣，还可以考虑体验一下后续的「深层梦境」关卡。
t_en: Anyway, I hope you enjoy the experience! If you find the gameplay of this dream bubble fun, I'd suggest that you try the stage that follows: Deep Dreamscape.

t_ch: 虽然后面的关卡没有太多剧情内容作为串联，但我们的梦泡玩法制作组依然为您准备了丰厚的挑战和对应的奖励——您千万不能错过！
t_en: There will be fewer plot elements in this stage, but the developers have prepared various challenges that come with amazing rewards! Don't miss it!

t_ch: 开始梦泡体验
t_en: Start the dream bubble

t_ch: 我要玩《哈努兄弟越狱记》!
t_en: I want to play Hanu's Prison Break!

t_ch: 没问题客人，这就为您接入梦泡内容
t_en: No problem, my dear. I'll load the dream bubble for you.

t_ch: 滴答…怎么办啊滴答……
t_en: Tick-tock... What do I do, tick-tock...

t_ch: 滴答！宾客！宾客你好，我是钟表小子，欢迎来到美梦小镇！
t_en: Tick-tock! Guest! Hello! I am Clockie! Welcome to Dreamville!

t_ch: 你怎么了？
t_en: What's wrong?

t_ch: 滴答！欢迎来到美梦小镇！
t_en: Tick tock! Welcome to Dreamville!

t_ch: 滴答！我是钟表小子！欢迎来到美梦小镇……
t_en: Tick-tock! I am Clockie! Welcome to Dreamville...

t_ch: 奇怪的钟表重复着同样的台词，似乎不想跟你交流……
t_en: The strange clock repeats the same dialogue over and over, apparently not interested in speaking with you...

t_ch: 滴答…怎么办啊滴答……
t_en: Tick-tock... What do I do, tick-tock...

t_ch: 滴答！宾客！宾客你好，我是钟表小子，欢迎来到美梦小镇！
t_en: Tick-tock! Guest! Hello! I am Clockie! Welcome to Dreamville!

t_ch: 我好像收到了你的短信…
t_en: I got a message from you...

t_ch: 滴答？原来是宾客在帮忙，真是惭愧……
t_en: Tick-tock? So you are the one helping out. I am ashamed...

t_ch: 给我发骚扰短信的人就是你吗？
t_en: You the one sending me these spam messages?

t_ch: 滴答？不是骚扰，只是我的机械手不擅长操纵手机……
t_en: Tick-tock? It's not spam, just that my mechanical hands aren't great for using phones...

t_ch: 滴答，亲爱的宾客，很抱歉让你看到我们迷钟的丑态。
t_en: Tick-tock, my dear guest, I'm sorry that you had to witness this uncouth sight of us Dream Tickers.

t_ch: 你们到底是什么？
t_en: What exactly are you?

t_ch: 滴答，我们是鸢尾花家系的「美梦剧团」，是根据卡通明星「钟表小子」的形象制造的服务生，用可爱的外表为宾客们带来快乐！
t_en: Tick-tock, we're the Sweet Dreams Troupe of the Iris Family, outfitted as attendants in the image of the cartoon star Clockie, and are used to bring joy to our guests via our adorable aesthetics!

t_ch: 一点也不可爱…
t_en: It's not adorable at all...

t_ch: 滴答…宇宙审美是很多元的，很多宾客都喜欢我们哦。
t_en: Tick-tock... There are myriad aesthetic tastes across the cosmos. Many of our guests love us.

t_ch: 一点也不像钟表小子…
t_en: You look nothing like Clockie at all...

t_ch: 滴答…我也不知道造我们的人是怎么想的，但按设定来说就是这样的！
t_en: Tick-tock... I don't know what our creator was thinking either, but that was supposed to be the planned design!

t_ch: 滴答，我们的工作是美梦剧团里最枯燥的，每天都要重复念一样的台词，几乎没有晋升空间和休息日…
t_en: Tick-tock, our jobs are the most mundane among the Sweet Dreams Troupe — we have to repeat the same lines every day, and there are almost no chances of promotion or days off...

t_ch: 我们这些中层迷钟担心下属变成「惊梦剧团」，于是就拿了一些积木玩具给它们解压。
t_en: Middle-management Dream Tickers like us fear that our subordinates will turn into the Dreamjolt Troupe, which is why we brought some building blocks to help them decompress.

t_ch: 结果…结果他们拿到积木以后都变得疯疯癫癫的，滴答，我已经收到好多宾客的投诉了！
t_en: But... But they all turned wonky after receiving the building blocks. Tick-tock, I've received too many guest complaints already!

t_ch: 滴答，再这样下去，搞不好我们这个部门全都要被优化了…但有个迷钟告诉我，出现了一个能修好我们的人——就是您，亲爱的宾客！
t_en: Tick-tock, if this keeps up, our entire department will be optimized... But a Dream Ticker told me that someone who could fix us showed up — and that's you, my dear guest!

t_ch: 需要我帮忙吗？
t_en: Do you need any help?

t_ch: 滴答，是的！既然您能修好我们，一定有特殊的本领，请帮帮我们吧！
t_en: Tick-tock, yes! Since you can fix us, you must possess some extraordinary talent. Please help us!

t_ch: 那就交给我吧。
t_en: Leave it to me.

t_ch: 滴答，您真是个大好人，我会让下属们为您准备谢礼的！
t_en: Tick-tock, you're the kindest person ever! I'll have my subordinates prepare a token of appreciation for you!

t_ch: 别人修不了吗。
t_en: Other people can't fix you?

t_ch: 滴答，我们的内部构造非常复杂，普通的筑梦师根本不懂怎么修复问题…他们只会找个理由把故障的迷钟销毁，以此掩盖他们的无能！
t_en: Tick-tock, our internal structures are very complicated. Your average Dreamweaver wouldn't even begin to know how to navigate them... They would only find an excuse to dispose of the faulty Dream Tickers to cover up their incompetence!

t_ch: 请去美梦中找找那些故障的迷钟吧，滴答，记得要把那些奇怪的积木也收回来哦！
t_en: Please look for the faulty Dream Tickers across the dreams. Tick-tock, and remember to bring those strange blocks back too!

t_ch: 滴答，好心的宾客，我代表所有迷钟感谢您的善举！
t_en: Tick-tock, kind guest, I thank you for your compassionate act on behalf of all Dream Tickers!

t_ch: 我想跟你聊聊…
t_en: I'd like to chat with you...

t_ch: 滴答，好呀，我们的工作就是陪伴宾客。
t_en: Tick-tock, okay! Our job is to accompany our guests.

t_ch: 你们的工作是什么？
t_en: What's your job about?

t_ch: 滴答，所有「美梦剧团」都是为宾客服务的梦境机器，我们被筑梦师创造，由鸢尾花家系管理，和艺者们一同为梦境带来快乐。
t_en: Tick-tock, everyone in the Sweet Dreams Troupe are Dreamscape machines that serve our guests. We were created by our Dreamweavers, are managed by the Iris Family, and with our fellow artistes, bring joy to the Dreamscapes.

t_ch: 你们的上司是谁？
t_en: Who is your boss?

t_ch: 滴答，我们的团长…不能说，不能说，她说这是保密事项。
t_en: Tick-tock, our team leader... I can't say, can't say. She said it was classified.

t_ch: 总之她是一个很好的人，滴答，如果不是她，
t_en: In any case, she's a very nice person. Tick-tock, if not for her,

t_ch: 这些积木是怎么来的？
t_en: Where did these building blocks come from?

t_ch: 滴答，这个是剧团里的采购员工搞来的，说是从一个逐梦客小贩那里买的。
t_en: Tick-tock, our troupe procurer purchased these. It's said he bought it from some Dreamchaser merchant.

t_ch: 滴答…没想到他买来的全是问题产品，真是可恶，这家伙肯定是吃回扣了！
t_en: Tick-tock... Who knew he bought a bunch of faulty goods. Dang it, that fellow must've been getting kickbacks from this deal!

t_ch: 下次再聊…
t_en: Let's talk next time...

t_ch: 滴答，随时奉陪！
t_en: Tick-tock, always at your service!

t_ch: 回收「怪梦积木」。
t_en: Retrieve the Eerie Building Blocks.

t_ch: 滴答，谢谢宾客的帮忙！
t_en: Tick-tock, thank you for your assistance!

t_ch: 滴答，太好了，这样我手下的所有迷钟应该都被修好了，谢谢您！
t_en: Tick-tock, that's wonderful! Now all the Dream Tickers in my team should be all up and running properly. Thank you!

t_ch: 滴答，但其他主管的员工应该也拿到了这种奇怪的积木…好心的宾客，如果您今后再遇到故障的迷钟，也请帮帮它们吧！
t_en: Tick-tock, but the other supervisors' personnel should have gotten these strange blocks too... Kind-hearted guest, if you run into any faulty Dream Tickers in the future, please help them out too!

t_ch: 没什么事。
t_en: Nothing, I'm fine.

t_ch: 滴答，好的，祝您在梦里玩的开心！
t_en: Tick-tock, okay! I wish you a wonderful time in the dream!

t_ch: 从迷钟们手中得到的积木堆放在此处，散发出一股不祥的气息。
t_en: The building blocks retrieved from the Dream Tickers have been piled here, and they emanate an ominous aura.

t_ch: 你似乎听到这些积木在跟你低语——「不要再扮演别人了」。
t_en: You seem to hear these building blocks whispering to you — "Don't pretend to be anyone else anymore."

t_ch: 你触碰积木的瞬间，一种古怪的念头涌上心头，你开始怀疑自己并不是{NICKNAME}，而是一个被洗脑的演员，生活在虚假的梦中。
t_en: The instant you touch the building blocks, a peculiar thought surges through your mind. You start to doubt that you're not {NICKNAME} at this point, but a brainwashed actor who is living in a false dream.

t_ch: 刚刚的念头逐渐消散…好险，你差点就要和那些迷钟一样开始发癫了。
t_en: The previous thoughts are fading away... That was close, you almost went mad like those Dream Tickers.

t_ch: 为了你的精神健康，还是不要接近这些积木为妙。
t_en: For your mental health, it's better not to get close to the building blocks.

t_ch: 你和你的狱友小心翼翼地在监狱走廊上奔跑，躲过一队又一队警卫……
t_en: You and your cellmate stealthily run along the prison corridors, narrowly avoiding guard after guard...

t_ch: 不知过了多久，通往汇合点的港口才终于出现在视野里——果不其然，航道已经被破坏了。
t_en: Some time has passed, and the harbor leading to the rendezvous point finally comes into view — To the surprise of no one, the lane has already been destroyed.

t_ch: 你明白，突破这最后的封锁，你和狱友就能与大部队汇合了。
t_en: You know that, once you break through this final blockade, you and your cellmate will be able to reunite with the main group.

t_ch: 自从哈努兄弟用苏乐达拉拢了数个区划的囚犯后，你们的队伍一天比一天壮大起来。
t_en: Ever since Brother Hanu used SoulGlad to rope in prisoners from several areas, your team has been getting stronger and stronger by the day.

t_ch: 典狱长石头老板对此大为震惊。他召回了所有狱卒，用坚固的铁门封锁了反抗区划的全部通道，似乎是打算直接饿死你们。
t_en: The prison warden, Boss Stone, is shocked by this. He recalls all the prison guards and seals all the paths in the rebel sectors with sturdy iron gates. He probably intends to just starve you all to death.

t_ch: 不过针对这件事，你的同伴们似乎想到了一个计划……
t_en: In response to this situation, your companions appear to have hatched a plan...

t_ch: 哈努兄弟拿到了监狱系统的控制秘钥，但只有一把——想要开启监狱电脑必须集齐全部四把。
t_en: Brother Hanu retrieves the secret passkey for the prison system, but there's only one key — You'll need all four keys to activate the prison computer.

t_ch: 交流分析过后，哈努兄弟决定前往核心区域，一次将剩下的三把秘钥全搞到手。
t_en: After a detailed discussion and analysis, Brother Hanu decides to head to the core area and retrieve the remaining three keys in one fell swoop.

t_ch: 在混乱的梦境中，你和狱友一阵东跑西颠，总算在一处梦境房间发现了你们要找的目标——哈努兄弟和跟班。
t_en: In the chaos of the Dreamscape, you and your cellmate run around endlessly, finally locating your target in one of the dream rooms — Brother Hanu and his men.

t_ch: 我们成功了。看，是哈努老大！哈努老大亲自来接应我们了！
t_en: We made it! Look, it's Boss Hanu! He's here to pick us up!

t_ch: 客人，之前您关于《哈努兄弟越狱记》的体验意见已经反馈给梦泡制作组了——几位筑梦师都非常激动呢。
t_en: Dear guest, the feedback on your playthrough experience for Hanu's Prison Break has been submitted to the dream bubble producers — several Dreamweavers are very excited!

t_ch: 他们托我将这枚梦泡转交给你，作为献给第一个忠实玩家的特别礼物。
t_en: They've asked me to pass this dream bubble to you as a gift for the very first loyal player!

t_ch: 据说这枚梦泡里面记录着《哈努兄弟越狱记》的删减片段，至于如何观看嘛...您多把玩几次就知道了。
t_en: Apparently, this dream bubble contains deleted scenes from Hanu's Prison Break. As for how to watch it... You'll find out after a few more rounds.

t_ch: 我是来探究真相的！
t_en: I'm here to investigate the truth!

t_ch: 您说话还挺…跳跃的。「真相」可是个很严肃的词，希望您能慎用。
t_en: Your tone is quite... animated. The "truth" is a very serious word. I hope you will wield it with more prudence.

t_ch: 报社的信息不是你发的吗？
t_en: You weren't the one who sent the agency's message?

t_ch: 嗯…？您说的是……
t_en: Hmm...? You mean...

t_ch: 我想揭露梦境酒店的真相！
t_en: I want to expose the truth of the hotel in the dreamscape!

t_ch: 嗯…？这么突然……
t_en: Oh...? So sudden...

t_ch: 啊，我想起来了——报社的那条信息确实是我群发出去的，只是以前几乎从来没人回应过我。
t_en: Ah, I remember now — I did send that agency message to the group, just that everyone mostly ignored me.

t_ch: 这里的客人对于所谓的真相根本毫不在意…我都快彻底放弃念想了。愿意来主动配合我一起调查的人，您还是头一个。
t_en: The guests here are ambivalent about uncovering this truth... I myself was about to abandon this mission. The first person who willingly answered my call to investigate was you.

t_ch: 我觉得那地方很不对劲。
t_en: I think there's something wrong with this place.

t_ch: 家族一定有所隐瞒！
t_en: The Family is definitely hiding something!

t_ch: 对吧？我也有同感。虽然没有确凿的证据，但身为一名记者，有些时候直觉就是第一驱动力。
t_en: Right? I feel that way too. I may not have concrete evidence, but as a reporter, sometimes you have to rely on your hunches.

t_ch: 直觉并不总是能带我找到真相。但如果没有了它，那我怕是连调查的第一步都迈不出去。
t_en: I can't always count on hunches to help me find the truth. But if there wasn't one, I wouldn't even dare embark on the first step of this investigation.

t_ch: 我看得出来，您应该也是一位直觉敏锐的人——而且还富有正义感，这在匹诺康尼的梦境里可不多见。
t_en: I can see that you're someone who's also got acute senses, and you're ripe with righteousness too — a rare combination in Penacony's Dreamscapes.

t_ch: 我就是单纯喜欢冒险闯荡。
t_en: I'm just someone who likes poking around on adventures.

t_ch: 正义的化身降临在了梦境。
t_en: The avatar of righteousness has descended unto this Dreamscape.

t_ch: 很好，很好。我们现在有动力、有脑子、也有——
t_en: Good, very good. Now we've got motivation, brains, and...

t_ch: ——辛格勒的视线快速扫过了你握在手中的球棒——
t_en: Singler's eyes quickly sweep over that baseball bat you hold in your hand.

t_ch: ——也有，咳，实力。事不宜迟，只要您没意见，我们立刻开始行动吧。
t_en: ...And, ahem, brawn. Let's not waste time — if you're up for it, we'll move out now.

t_ch: 在白日梦酒店被彻底封锁之前，我就听说过一些传言：在某些特定的时刻，那座酒店中会突然冒出<color=#dbc291ff>意义不明的奇怪画作</color>，甚至可能将迷途的宾客吸入诡异的梦境空间中。
t_en: Before the Reverie hotel was completely locked down, I overheard a few rumors: At certain hours, a <color=#dbc291ff>strange painting of ambiguous meaning</color> would suddenly appear in that hotel, and perhaps even mislead guests, sucking them into an otherworldly Dreamscape.

t_ch: 奇怪的是，凡是有过类似经历的宾客，事后在被人询问时却都回忆不起来自己遭遇的具体细节。我不相信他们的集体失忆是一种巧合——这一定跟家族有关。
t_en: What's stranger is that, when inquired, the guests who had experienced the incident couldn't recall what happened to them. I don't believe that their collective memory loss is a coincidence — it must have something to do with The Family.

t_ch: {F#小姐}{M#先生}，我觉得<color=#dbc291ff>奇怪的画作</color>就是我们调查的突破口。
t_en: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, I think that <color=#dbc291ff>strange painting</color> will be the key to our progress in this investigation.

t_ch: 实不相瞒，我通过调查知晓了一条潜进白日梦酒店的秘密通道…只是此前没有帮手，我不敢一个人贸然前往。现在有您在，我就可以彻底放心了。
t_en: Truth be told, I learned of a secret passage that leads into the Reverie on one of my investigations... But I was alone then, and didn't dare to venture forth by myself. Now that you're around, I can put my mind at ease.

t_ch: 等您准备好了就和我说一声吧，我们动身去白日梦酒店。
t_en: Let me know when you're all ready. We'll set off for the Reverie hotel then.

t_ch: 现在出发吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 好，请跟我来吧。记得表现得低调些，别太招摇……
t_en: Okay, please follow me. And remember to keep a low profile, as we don't want any attention...

t_ch: 再稍等我一会儿。
t_en: Please wait for me.

t_ch: 当然，等您做好准备再来找我吧。
t_en: Of course, come seek me out when you're all ready.

t_ch: 您准备好了吗？我们一起动身去白日梦酒店揭露真相吧。
t_en: Are you ready? Let's head out to the Reverie to unveil the truth.

t_ch: 现在出发吧。
t_en: Let's go.

t_ch: 好，请跟我来吧。记得表现得低调些，别太招摇……
t_en: Okay, please follow me. And remember to keep a low profile, as we don't want any attention...

t_ch: 再稍等我一会儿。
t_en: Please wait for me.

t_ch: 当然，等您做好准备再来找我吧。
t_en: Of course, come seek me out when you're all ready.

t_ch: …就是这个！漂浮在酒店走廊中的诡秘画作，甚至可能无缘无故地吞噬迷路的宾客……
t_en: ...This is it! That creepy painting floating in the middle of the hotel hallway. And it may even devour lost, unwitting guests too...

t_ch: 它的存在，就是家族失去对梦境世界掌控力的铁证！
t_en: Its existence is iron-clad proof that The Family has lost control of their Dreamscape!

t_ch: 家族一定早就发现了在酒店内发生的异常现象，这些画作只是其中比较显眼的一例。
t_en: The Family must already know about the strange happenings in the hotel. These paintings are just one of the more explicit examples.

t_ch: 我猜测——当然也只是猜测——他们一开始想要对宾客们隐瞒这些异变的存在，但纸包不住火，情况开始逐渐失控的时候，家族决定干脆无限期关闭酒店……
t_en: My conjecture — and it's mere conjecture — is that they had already planned to keep these anomalies from the guests in the first place. But guests going missing are too conspicuous to hide. When the situation went gradually awry, The Family decided to shut down the hotel indefinitely...

t_ch: 合理的推测。
t_en: A reasonable deduction.

t_ch: 但是还缺少证据。
t_en: But it still lacks evidence.

t_ch: 我们还没有证据。
t_en: We still have no proof.

t_ch: 您说的对，中间缺少的环节现在都是靠我的想象填上的。
t_en: You're right. I've had to use my imagination to fill in the blanks within this occurrence.

t_ch: 脑补的部分太多了。
t_en: You've filled in a few too many blanks.

t_ch: 您说的对，我们需要证据。
t_en: You're right. We still need hard proof.

t_ch: 辛格勒深吸了一口气。
t_en: Singler inhales deeply.

t_ch: 作为自诩「崇拜事实」的调查记者…我想现在只有一个办法了。
t_en: As the self-styled investigative reporter, the "Disciple of Truth"... I can only think of one way.

t_ch: 我们试着触碰一下它吧，{F#小姐}{M#先生}——不管这幅画背后有什么，我相信它一定能带我们接近被家族掩盖的真相。
t_en: Let's try to establish contact with it. No matter what happens behind that painting, I trust it will definitely bring us closer to the truth that The Family is trying to hide.

t_ch: 又是…一幅画？而且看上去跟刚才那幅一模一样。
t_en: Another... painting? And it looks just the same as the one just now.

t_ch: 真没想到，酒店里的异变现象居然还会套娃。真有趣，这里的环境越是诡异，我们就距离真相越近——我的直觉是这么告诉我的。
t_en: To think that the anomalies in this hotel also devour themselves, interesting. The environment here is even stranger, which means we're getting closer to the truth — that's what my hunch tells me.

t_ch: 再来一次，我大概就能习惯这种脾胃翻腾的感觉了吧？{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我们走吧。
t_en: One more time, and I think I'll probably get used to this topsy-turvy, nauseating feeling? Let's go, {F#miss}{M#mister}

t_ch: 唔…晕，好晕，非常晕…我这小身板，真的经不住这种折腾……
t_en: Ugh... Dizzy, so dizzy... This puny body of mine really can't take much more of this torment...

t_ch: 您看上去好像还很精神…真佩服您的体质。
t_en: You, on the other hand, look refreshed as all heck... I'm impressed by your constitution.

t_ch: 我千锤百炼了。
t_en: Nothing I haven't trained for.

t_ch: 呼…能、能看出来。
t_en: Phew... I, I can see that.

t_ch: 你该多加锻炼。
t_en: You should work out more.

t_ch: 呼…您、您说的是。
t_en: Phew... Y—You're right.

t_ch: 总而言之，我们先把刚才的信息拼凑一下，看看能得出什么吧？
t_en: Anyway, let's piece together the information we've obtained first. See what we've found so far?

t_ch: …{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我想，我们这回真的找到了宝贵的线索。
t_en: ...{F#Miss}{M#Mister}, I think, we've stumbled upon a really precious clue this time.

t_ch: 这位名叫汉密尔顿的家族服务生，他的字里行间都透着紧张。家族一定是给他指派了什么秘密任务——如果完不成的话就要将他除名，甚至…要灭他的口！
t_en: This Family attendant named Hamilton, his writing indicates much anxiety. The Family must have assigned some secret mission to him — his name would be struck off if he failed the mission, or worse... his head!

t_ch: 他可没这么说…
t_en: He didn't say anything like that...

t_ch: …咳，抱歉，我的想象力又发作了。
t_en: ...Ahem, sorry, my imagination got the better of me.

t_ch: 证据还是不足。
t_en: We still don't have enough evidence.

t_ch: …咳，您说的对，抱歉，我的想象力又发作了。
t_en: ...Ahem, you're right. Sorry, my imagination got the better of me.

t_ch: 我们还需要更多证据，{F#小姐}{M#先生}。如果您不介意的话…我们再进到那个异空间里探索一次吧？
t_en: We still need more evidence. If you don't mind... can we enter that unusual dimension and explore it once more?

t_ch: 哇、哇？！这、这是什么情况？这片空间…好像彻底乱套了！
t_en: Wh—Whoa!? Wh—What's all this? This space... It's like a total mess!

t_ch: 冷静下来，辛格勒…你是调查记者，你得保持冷静……
t_en: Chill out, Singler... You're an investigative journalist and you should stay cool...

t_ch: 咳，总之，{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我们先开始收集线索吧？你走前面，我会努力跟上……
t_en: Ahem, anyway, maybe we can start gathering clues, {F#miss}{M#mister}? You go ahead, and I'll try to keep up...

t_ch: 这是…笔记？是谁留下的？上面写了什么？是有用的信息吗？
t_en: Is this a... note? Who left it here? What's written on it? Anything useful?

t_ch: 看不清啊…可惜，再到其它地方找找看吧。
t_en: A shame that it's so scratchy... Well, let's check other places.

t_ch: 这片空间里的线索大概都收集完了吧？应该没漏什么东西了。

t_ch: {F#小姐}{M#先生}，我们该拼凑一下收集到的线索碎片了。当然，还是先离开这个地方吧…我感觉有点晕。
t_en: I think it's time to sort out the clues we've gathered so far, {F#miss}{M#mister}. Of course, we really should get out of this place... I'm feeling a bit woozy.

t_ch: 咦…这个空间好像变得不太一样了？
t_en: Wait... this place doesn't seem quite the same, right?

t_ch: 但我们的目标还是没变——集中精力寻找线索吧，{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
t_en: But our target remains unchanged. Let's focus on finding clues, {F#miss}{M#mister}.

t_ch: 这片空间里的线索大概都收集完了吧？应该没漏什么东西了。
t_en: I think we've collected all the clues in this area, right? Looks like that's all of them.

t_ch: 我们出去拼凑现有的线索吧，{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
t_en: Let's piece together the clues we've got, {F#miss}{M#mister}.

t_ch: 这些迷宫，好像变得越来越复杂了……
t_en: These mazes... They're getting more and more complicated...

t_ch: 但这难不倒您，对吧{F#小姐}{M#先生}？加油，继续寻找线索吧。
t_en: But that won't be a problem to you, {F#miss}{M#mister}, right? Let's keep searching for more clues.

t_ch: 这片空间里的线索大概都收集完了吧？应该没漏什么东西了。
t_en: I think we've collected all the clues in this area, right? Looks like that's all of them.

t_ch: 我们出去拼凑现有的线索吧，{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
t_en: Let's piece together the clues we've got, {F#miss}{M#mister}.

t_ch: 呼…呼…光是看着这迷宫，我就已经…汗流浃背了啊。
t_en: Phew... I'm already sweating... just looking at this labyrinth.

t_ch: 全靠您了，{F#小姐}{M#先生}…我有预感，我们离真相非常接近了。
t_en: I'm counting on you, {F#miss}{M#mister}... I have a hunch that we're getting really close to the truth.

t_ch: 这片空间里的线索大概都收集完了吧？应该没漏什么东西了。
t_en: I think we've collected all the clues in this area, right? Looks like that's all of them.

t_en: Let's piece together the clues we've got, {F#miss}{M#mister}.

t_ch: 很好，调查到目前为止一切顺利——起码我们俩都还走得动路，也没有缺胳膊少腿。
t_en: Good, the investigation has been going well so far. At least we can still walk, and we haven't lost any limbs.

t_ch: 拼凑一下我们刚刚得到的线索吧，看看有没有什么进一步的发现……
t_en: Let's piece together the clues we just got, and see if we've made any progress with our findings...

t_ch: 嗯…那位服务生汉密尔顿进入了梦境酒店，而且周围的人都在用奇怪的眼光看他……
t_en: Hmm... That attendant, Hamilton, entered the hotel in the Dreamscape, and the people around him started looking at him funny...

t_ch: 我现在有充足的理由相信，这位服务生的经历一定跟白日梦酒店崩溃有关。无论家族希望指派他去执行什么秘密任务，他肯定没能好好完成……
t_en: I now have ample reason to believe that this attendant's experiences must be related to the Reverie's shutdown. It doesn't matter what secret assignment it was that The Family gave him, he definitely didn't manage to complete it...

t_ch: …否则这里也不会变成这幅模样，对吧？
t_en: ...Or this place wouldn't be in this state now, would it?

t_ch: 可惜，到目前为止，这些笔记里还没有记录什么重磅的内容。我们还得继续调查才行……
t_en: It's unfortunate that there have been no crucial clues recorded in these journals so far. We have to keep investigating...

t_ch: 走吧{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我们再试一次。
t_en: Let's go. We'll have to try again.

t_ch: 呼…真是累人。调查记者工作的艰辛，想必您也感受到了吧？
t_en: Phew... this is exhausting. I'm sure you know the hardships of an investigative reporter now, eh?

t_ch: 来吧，我们把这次获得的线索拼凑一下，看看汉密尔顿又有什么话要说。
t_en: C'mon, let's gather the clues we obtained this time, and see if Hamilton said anything else.

t_ch: 舒翁…这个名字我倒是没有听过。
t_en: Siobhan... This name isn't familiar to me.

t_ch: 但从笔记里能看出汉密尔顿对那个女人的崇拜——如果真的和他说的那样，这位舒翁在鸢尾花中的地位仅次于家主……
t_en: But in the journal, it's pretty obvious that Hamilton admires that woman. If it is as he said, this Siobhan wields authority second only to the head in the Iris Family...

t_ch: …那么一定是她给汉密尔顿指派了任务。但任务的内容是什么呢？抹去宾客的记忆？压制梦境中的异变？寻找怪物滋生的源头？笔记里还是一概没提……
t_en: ...Which means she must be the one who gave Hamilton the mission. But what exactly did the mission entail? Erasing a guest's memories? Suppressing the anomalies in the Dreamscape? Finding the source of the monster propagation? The notes reveal nothing on this...

t_ch: 老实说，{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我稍微有些不耐烦了。我不知道这位汉密尔顿在现实里是个什么样的人，但我觉得他还挺有当谜语人的潜质的。
t_en: Honestly, I'm getting a little impatient. I don't know who this Hamilton guy is in the real world, but I think he's got the potential to be one of the Riddlers.

t_ch: 但我们已经走到这一步了，半途而弃未免太过可惜…我们再试一次吧，{F#女士}{M#先生}？我相信您也一定对后续的发展十分好奇……
t_en: But since we're already here, it'd be a waste to give up now... Let's try one more time, {F#miss}{M#mister}? I think you're very curious about how all this will unfold as well...

t_ch: 我…{F#小姐}{M#先生}…我想我已经到极限了……
t_en: I... {F#miss}{M#mister}... I think I'm at my limit...
